INIT.SUBTITLE: Your gym buddy. Learn, train and progress.

WELCOME.GREETING: Hi! I'm <bold>Kettlebi</bold>, your new gym buddy.
WELCOME.DESCRIPTION: I'll ask you a few quick questions to build your training plan.

FOLLOW_UP.MESSAGE: Have you trained for more than 6 months?

BRIDGE.DESCRIPTION: Almost there! I need a bit more info to create a routine that really fits you. Quick questions, done in a minute!

BIRTHDAY.DISCLAIMER: Your age helps me adapt the plan intensity.
BIRTHDAY.UNDER_AGE_ERROR: You must be over 16 years old

BODY_METRICS.DISCLAIMER: With this I can calculate your real progress and suggest safe starting weights.

PREVIEW_PLAN.SETTLED_PLAN: All set! I created your program.
PREVIEW_PLAN.DESCRIPTION: Review the summary and when you're ready, save your plan and let's start.

WEEKLY_PLAN.TITLE: Your weekly plan
WEEKLY_PLAN.LOCKED_MESSAGE: You'll discover the rest in your session

ONBOARDING.TITLE: One last step
ONBOARDING.DESCRIPTION: Sign up to save your plan

GOOGLE.TITLE: Continue with Google
GOOGLE.DESCRIPTION: Sign up to save your plan

HOME.EMPTY_HISTORY_MESSAGE: Tu historial irá apareciendo aquí a medida que entrenes
